notes: One-click LOCAL display flash: 'Flash my compiled build' pushes the .4XE you just compiled in Workshop straight from the project folder over the 4D-UPA (no staging). App auto-opens the plasma overview the first time the Opta connects each session. Ships with the hardened Opta firmware (verified flash persistence, watchdog, two-pass plasma sweep, servo-ready + plate-sweep streaming to the panel, and Waveshare bridge self-heal).
